headline: Will e.l.f. Beauty's Skin Care Portfolio Lead the Next Leg Up?
summary: e.l.f. Beauty's skin care mix rises to 23% of global consumption as e.l.f. SKIN, Naturium and rhode gain scale and pursue more share.
